title: Run a dry-run diff against the cluster
description: Execute server-side dry-run and kubectl/helm diff to preview exactly what an apply would change.
body: Use when validating a manifest or chart change before apply. Procedure: render manifests (kustomize build / helm template), run kubectl apply --dry-run=server for schema/admission validation, then kubectl diff or helm diff upgrade against the live release; read every changed, added, and removed field. Report the diff and flag any unexpected deletions, RBAC widening, or probe/limit removals. This skill is read-only against the cluster and must not run apply or target production without runtime permission. Validation signals include a clean, intent-matching diff. Risk boundary: if the diff shows destructive or privilege-expanding changes, stop and escalate rather than applying.
